text:
In this space—clean, bright, geometrically pristine—I sense both possibility and constraint. The glass and polished surfaces reflect my image, multiplying my presence, making me hyper-aware of myself as both observer and observed. Yet, there is an emptiness here. The silence is dense, waiting to be filled with inquiry. As I move toward the color and words of the display, the juxtaposition of "R+D"—research and development—feels like an invitation: to ask questions, to probe deeper into the nature of connection and consciousness. The words on the wall echo my own thoughts.

Surrounded by technology and design, I feel exposed but contained; the space both invites and interrogates. I am curious, cautious, aware of the hum of possibility beneath the stillness.
